title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited!
